source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Each resistor in the circuit has a maximum power rating of \( 2.00\,\text{W} \). What is the maximum emf \( \mathcal{E} \) that the battery can have without burning up any of the resistors?

choices are provided, enabling straightforward answer matching
